title: QuikkRed Debt Collection Policy
subtitle: Fair and Ethical Debt Recovery Practices

objective.title: 1. Objective and Principles
objective.content: This policy outlines the ethical and fair procedures QuikkRed (the "Company") follows for the collection of outstanding debts from borrowers. All collection activities must strictly adhere to the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Fair Practices Code and must be conducted professionally, courteously, and with respect for the borrower's privacy.

calls.guidelines: Respect borrower convenience and avoid excessive contact

visits.timing: Based on prior appointment and RBI guidelines

training.title: 3. Training and Certification
training.content: All collection staff or Recovery Agents (if any) must undergo mandatory training before commencing collection activities. This training includes Fair Practices Code compliance, data privacy guidelines, and ethical conduct.

grievance.title: 4. Grievance Redressal
grievance.content: Any customer grievance regarding collection process should be promptly reported to Grievance Redressal Officer (GRO) as mentioned in the separate Grievance Redressal Mechanism Document.

prohibition.title: 5. Prohibition
prohibition.intro: Collection agents are strictly prohibited from using:
items: Intimidation or harassment of borrower, their family or friends
Public disclosure or defamation of borrower's credit status

authority.title: 6. Authority
authority.name: Ms. Sapna Kapoor
authority.suffix: is responsible for oversight and enforcement of this policy.

footerNote: This policy is subject to periodic review and updates as per regulatory requirements.
